title: alchemilla fissa var. fallax
intro: Alchemilla fissa var. fallax, also known as a type of lady's mantle, is a plant species in the Rosaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Alchemilla fissa var. fallax include soothing digestive issues, reducing menstrual cramps, and promoting overall well-being. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
